Matter is off calendar, no motion pending.

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ENZO NABIEV, Esq. of Moon & Yang, APC (Tel: 213-232-3129) for plaintiff;
Atty. HEATHER DAIZA, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 916-830-6531) for defendant California Parking Company, Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MATTHEW ROTHCHILD's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed motion for final approval of class action settlement is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Allen Feghali (213-232-3128; allen.feghali@moonyanglaw.com) of MOON & YANG, APC for Plaintiff.
Scott McLeod (smcleod@grsm.com) of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP for Defendant.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MATTHEW ROTHCHILD's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED with conditions that notice be corrected and to reflect the correct agreed allocation as represented by counsel.

order is signed.
